properties.body:
[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 383/26
WESTERN BALTIC. WEST OF DARSS
OPERATIONS BY MV 'ATALANTI' CS 'SVDM5'
IN THE AREA BETWEEN
54-34,5N 012-27,3E,
54-21,4N 012-13,8E,
54-17,6N 012-18,8E AND
54-34,3N 012-28,1E.
RESTRICTED MANOEVRABILITY DURING OPERATIONS.
BERTH OF 1 NM REQUESTED.
CANCEL GERMAN NAVIGATIONAL WARNING NO. 374
